response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and developer-tooling exposure (CI/CD, test frameworks, GitLab/Docker setup, custom test runners), but the role requires a Level II people manager with 2+ years of direct people management and 3+ years of technical leadership. The resume shows no formal people-management experience, no reports, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work at scale, which are central to this Engineering Productivity manager role.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure
12+ years of software engineering with TDD, pairing, trunk-based development practices relevant to productivity teams
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through workshops, courses, and conference talks (Selenium course, Web Internals, FOSS4G)
concerns: No evidence of formal people management or direct reports — minimum requirement is 2 years
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale (brief iOS/Apple TV work in 2015–2016 only)
Title is 'Senior Software Developer' with no Staff/Principal/Lead-level org influence or roadmap ownership shown

key_factors.factor: Strong developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
